$comment: ★ PoC #08 Day 1 — mybatis/jpetstore-6 reference webapp analysis. ★ paradigm-cross corroboration #1 (MEDIUM 자격 / 본 방법론 일반화 axis). chain 1 (planning) 입력 / plan §3-A 자동화율 측정 데이터. 정탐 (research-poc-08-jpetstore6.md) 흡수 + 본 session 실측 corroboration.

★ Stripes 1.6.0 (NOT Spring MVC) — ActionBean + @DefaultHandler + convention default routing (★ 정탐 §정정: @HandlesEvent + @UrlBinding ❌ / @DefaultHandler + 메서드 이름 = event)
JSP 20 file (Account 5 + Cart 2 + Catalog 6 + Order 4 + Common 3)
JUnit 5.13.4 + Mockito 5.18.0 + AssertJ — ★ ★ Test 18 class (★ PoC #06+#07 = 0 vs 본 PoC = 18 / 적대성 flip)
Docker (Dockerfile + docker-compose.yaml — Tomcat 9-jdk17 + HSQLDB + JNDI DataSource)
Apache Commons FileUpload (이미지 ❌ / Stripes 자체 multipart)
